backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Naturavini backend with access-controlled CRUD operations for wine entries and user profiles, plus sample data initialization using a Map-based store.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Naturavini logo was removed from the PDF export in WineTable.tsx, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-39.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Naturavini wine catalogue app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining shadcn/ui OKLCH CSS variable tokens for light and dark themes, with no custom Naturavini brand overrides.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Naturavini Wine Price List app, mounting the React app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing PageHeader, WineList, a footer with dynamic year and caffeine.ai attribution, and the Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/DeleteWineDialog: AlertDialog confirmation component for deleting a wine entry, displaying the wine name and winery with confirm/cancel actions and a loading spinner.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Olive green page header displaying the Natura Vini v4 logo with an error fallback to text, plus an Internet Identity admin login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/WineFormModal.ts: Dialog modal for adding or editing a wine entry, including fields for country, winery, wine name, year, grape variety, wine style, price, and sold-out status, pre-populated from existing data when editing.
frontend/src/components/WineTable.tsx: React component that displays a sortable, grouped-by-country wine table with add/edit/delete actions for admins and a PDF export feature using dynamically loaded jsPDF.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (useGetAllWines, useAddWine, useUpdateWine, useDeleteWine) for CRUD operations on wines via the ICP backend actor, with toast notifications on success/error.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Playfair Display and Inter fonts, configures Tailwind CSS design tokens (colors, radius) for light/dark themes, and defines utility component classes like country-banner and wine-row.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/WineList.tsx: Page component that renders the wine price list with a header, admin mode indicator, and the WineTable component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Naturavini frontend, defining custom colors (olive, tangerine, semantic tokens via oklch CSS variables), fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Naturavini wine price list app project at version 25, listing existing features, known issues (modal transparency, data persistence, PDF export), and architectural notes favoring incremental builds.
